Hayden Field Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow See All by Hayden Field is The Verge’s senior AI reporter.

Anthropic is debuting a new AI model as part of a cybersecurity partnership with major cloud and platform companies, aiming to help defenders identify serious software flaws earlier.

The company says Project Glasswing is designed for defensive security teams that need a faster way to inspect code, infrastructure, and operational workflows before attackers find the same weaknesses.

The launch also signals that AI vendors are increasingly packaging models as operational products for enterprise risk teams rather than only as general-purpose assistants.
